name: Scottish Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Coat a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a medium-size bowl, sift dry ingredients together.
4. Add butter, mixing into flour using your fingers until crumbly.
5. Gradually add buttermilk and knead the dough into a soft mixture.
6. Fold in raisins.
7. On a floured board, roll out dough to 1/2 inch (1 cm) thick.
8. Cut into 16 rounds with a round cutter.
9. Place scones on a baking sheet.
10. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Makes 16 scones. Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 97; CHO:7mg; CAR: 3g; SOD: 3g; FAT: 3g.
